login.notes: Required multiple submits; eventually React form accepted native setter + input event dispatch

pages.heading: Performance Management
pages.notes: Performance Hub landing renders, sidebar active

pages.heading: Performance Reviews
pages.notes: Cycles NOT present — page lists individual Review records (SELF DRAFT, MANAGER DRAFT for 01/07/2026-30/09/2026). S4 'cycles list' expectation not met: no review cycles UI; only per-employee reviews. Finding: no cycles-management view at /performance/reviews.

OKR tree does NOT render. Main element stays at innerHTML length 4159 (skeleton-aura placeholders). Both OKR GET endpoints remain pending >10s — slow or unresponsive backend endpoints. S11 OKR tree check FAILED.

pages.heading: 360-Degree Feedback
pages.notes: Multi-rater feedback UI renders. Empty state: 'No feedback cycles' — CTA 'Create a new 360-degree feedback cycle to get started.' Tabs: Feedback Cycles (0), Pending Reviews (0), My Results (0)

pages.heading: Training Programs
pages.notes: Tabs: My Trainings, Course Catalog, Manage Programs, Growth Roadmap. Counters all 0. Renders after ~5-7s wait.

pages.heading: Employee Surveys
pages.notes: Counters Total/Active/Drafts/Completed/Responses all 0. Filters: Status (Draft/Active/Paused/Completed/Archived) + Type (Engagement/Satisfaction/Pulse/Exit/Feedback/Custom). Render latency ~5-7s.

pages.heading: Employee Recognition
pages.notes: Tabs: Public Feed, Received, Given, Top Contributors, Quick Recognize. Award types: Kudos, Appreciation, Achievement, Spot Award. All metrics = 0.

S4_performance_reviews_cycles.notes: Page renders individual reviews, not cycles. No cycle list UI observed at /performance/reviews. No cycle-creation was attempted (rules: no create).

S11_okr_tree.notes: OKR tree never rendered; page stuck on skeleton loader because /api/v1/okr/objectives/my and /api/v1/okr/company/objectives GET requests remain pending.

findings.title: OKR page stuck on skeleton loader — both OKR endpoints hang as pending
findings.details: GET /api/v1/okr/objectives/my and GET /api/v1/okr/company/objectives never return (status pending beyond 10s). UI never exits skeleton-aura placeholder state. No OKR tree rendered. No console errors. Suggests backend OKRController is slow, blocked, or has a long-running query for HR_MANAGER role.

findings.title: Cycles list is not exposed on this route
findings.details: Reviews page lists reviews per employee, not cycles. If cycles management is a separate feature, it is not linked from /performance/reviews. This may be by design but conflicts with the S4 task expectation of a 'cycles list'.

findings.title: Long skeleton-loader time (~5-7s) on first paint
findings.details: Surveys, Training, Recognition all require 5-7 seconds before content replaces skeleton. OPTIONS/CORS preflight + cold-start Spring endpoint latency suspected. Not a failure, but affects perceived performance.

summary.notes: 6/7 pages render correctly. /performance/okr fails due to hanging OKR backend endpoints. No console errors or 4xx/5xx network responses anywhere. Login succeeded as jagadeesh@nulogic.io (HR_MANAGER).
